top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Number of farms up for sale in England hits two-decade high
top_signals.summary: Rising costs, falling subsidies and inheritance tax changes have hit demand for agricultural land

top_signals.title: Conference spotlights business role in rebuilding natural capital
Mike Ashley’s Frasers muscles in on Harvey Nichols sale
top_signals.summary: Mike Ashley’s Frasers Group has gatecrashed the sales process for Harvey Nichols, defying the initial objections of the luxury department store’s brand partners. The fashion group, founded by billionaire Ashley, has successfully entered into the auction for the high-end retail group after demanding it be allowed to take part, City AM understands.  Harvey Nichols had [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
